Python数据结构

2018-03-10
HSH
学习笔记
Python  数据结构
  • python实现链表
  • python实现栈
  • python实现树以及7种遍历方式

python实现链表

class Node(object):
    '''
    data: 节点保存的数据
    _next: 保存下一个节点对象
    '''
    def __init__(self, data, pnext=None):
        self.data = data
        self._next = pnext
    
    def __repr__(self):
        '''
        用来定义Node的字符输出
        print为输出data
        '''
        return str(self.data)

class ChainTable(object):
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = None
        self.length = 0
    
    #判断是否为空
    def isEmpty(self):
        return self.length == 0
   
    #增加一个节点
    def append(self, data_or_node):
        item = None
        if isinstance(data_or_node, Node):
            item = data_or_node
        else:
            item = Node(data_or_node)
        
        if not self.head:
            self.head = item
            self.length += 1
        else:
            node = self.head
            while node._next:
                node = node._next
            node._next = item
            self.length += 1

    #删除一个节点
    def delete(self, index):
        if self.isEmpty():
            print('this chain table is empty')
            return

        if index < 0 or index >= self.length:
            print('error: out of index')
            return

        #由于没有空头结点，所以删除第一节节点需要特殊考虑
        if index == 0:
            self.head = self.head._next
            self.length -= 1
            return 

        j = 0
        prev = self.head
        node = self.head
        while node._next and j < index:
            prev = node
            node = node._next
            j += 1
        if j == index:
            prev._next = node._next
            self.length -= 1

    #修改一个节点
    def update(self, index, data):
        if self.isEmpty():
            print('this chain table is empty')
            return

        if index < 0 or index >= self.length:
            print('error: out of index')
            return

        j = 0
        node = self.head
        while node._next and j < index:
            node = node._next
            j += 1

        if j == index:
            node.data = data


    #查找一个节点
    def getItem(self, index):
        if self.isEmpty():
            print('this chain table is empty')
            return

        if index < 0 or index >= self.length:
            print('error: out of index')
            return

        j = 0
        node = self.head
        while node._next and j < index:
            node = node._next
            j += 1

        return node.data

    #查找一个节点的索引
    def getIndex(self, data):
        if self.isEmpty():
            print('this chain table is empty')
            return

        j = 0
        node = self.head
        while node:
            if node.data == data:
                return j
            node = node._next
            j += 1

        if j == self.length:
            print('{} not found'.format(data))
            return

    #插入一个节点
    def insert(self, idnex, data_or_node):
        if self.isEmpty():
            print('this chain table is empty')
            return
        if index < 0 or index >= self.length:
            print('error: out of index')
            return

        if isinstance(data_or_node, Node):
            item = data_or_node
        else:
            item = Node(data_or_node)

        if index == 0:
            item._next = self.head
            self.head = item
            self.length += 1
            return 

        j = 0
        prev = self.head
        node = self.head
        while node._next and j < index:
            prev = node
            node = node._next
            j += 1

        if j == index:
            item._next = node
            prev._next = item
            self.length += 1


    #清空链表
    def clear(self):
        self.head = None
        self.length = 0

python实现栈

class Stack(object):
    def __init__(self):
        self.items = []

    def is_empty(self):
        return self.items == []

    #返回栈顶元素
    def peek(self):
        return self.items[-1]

    #返回栈的大小
    def size(self):
        return len(self.items)

    #入栈
    def push(self, item):
        self.items.append(item)

    #出栈
    def pop(self):
        return self.items.pop()

python实现树以及7种遍历方式

  • 先序遍历（递归&循环）
  • 中序遍历（递归&循环）
  • 后续遍历（递归&循环）
  • 宽度优先遍历（循环）
class Node(object):
    def __init__(self, elem=-1, lchild=None, rchild=None):
        self.elem = elem
        self.lchild = lchild
        self.rchild = rchild

class Tree(object):
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = None

    def add(self, item):
        node = Node(item)
        if self.root is None:
            self.root = node
        else:
            q = [self.root]

            while True:
                pop_node = q.pop(0)
                if pop_node.lchild is None:
                    pop_node.lchild = node
                    return 
                elif pop_node.rchild is None:
                    pop_node.rchild = node
                    return
                else:
                    q.append(pop_node.lchild)
                    q.append(pop_node.rchild)

    #前序遍历，递归方法
    def perorder_digui(self, root):
        if root == None:
            return
        print(root.elem)
        self.perorder_digui(root.lchild)
        self.perorder_digui(root.rchild)

    #中序遍历，递归方法
    def inorder_digui(self, root):
        if root == None:
            return
        self.inorder_digui(root.lchild)
        print(root.elem)
        self.inorder_digui(root.rchild)

    #后续遍历，递归方法
    def postorder_digui(self, root):
        if root == None:
            return 
        self.postorder_digui(root.lchild)
        self.postorder_digui(root.rchild)
        print(root.elem)

    #前序遍历，循环方法
    def perorder_xunhuan(self, root):
        s = Stack()
        s.push(root)
        while not s.is_empty():
            node = s.pop()
            print(node.elem)
            if node.rchild:
                s.push(node.rchild)
            if node.lchild:
                s.push(node.lchild)

    #中序遍历，循环方法
    def inorder_xunhuan(self, root):
        s = Stack()
        node = root
        while node or not s.is_empty():
            if node:
                s.push(node)
                node = node.lchild
            else:
                node = s.pop()
                print(node.elem)
                node = node.rchild

    #后续遍历，循环方法
    def postorder_xunhuan(self, root):
        s1 = Stack()
        s2 = Stack()
        s1.push(root)
        while not s1.is_empty():
            node = s1.pop()
            s2.push(node)
            if node.lchild:
                s1.push(node.lchild)
            if node.rchild:
                s1.push(node.rchild)
        while not s2.is_empty():
            print(s2.pop().elem)

    #层次遍历
    def bin_tree_level_traverse(self, root):
        q = queue.Queue()
        q.put(root)
        while not q.empty():
            node = q.get()
            print(node.elem)
            if node.lchild:
                q.put(node.lchild)
            if node.rchild:
                q.put(node.rchild)
